zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Brewse於大約1370年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir John de Brewse40歲，母親Joan Shardelow36歲。他於大約1405年與Ela Stapleton在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年9月30日之前在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Brewse于大约1370年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir John de Brewse40岁，母亲Joan Shardelow36岁。他于大约1405年与Ela Stapleton在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1424年9月30日之前在英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Brewse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Montgomeryshire; also Norfolk): nickname for an irritating person, from Middle English brese ‘gadfly’ (Old English brēosa). See also Breeze , compare Breece .

German: habitational name from any of numerous places called Breese or Breesen, in Mecklenburg, Wendland (near Hanover), Brandenburg, and Pomerania. In some cases the placename is derived from a Slavic word meaning ‘birch’ (brěza in Old Slavic).

variants.name: Brese
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle Low German brēse ‘brooch, needle, clasp’, denoting a maker of such items.

variants.name: Breece
meanings: English (Montgomeryshire and Denbighshire): variant of   Breese  .

variants.name: Breeze
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire; also Norfolk, Montgomeryshire, and Lancashire): variant of Breese . The name migrated from Shropshire into Montgomeryshire. Some dictionaries derive it from the Welsh patronymic ab Rhys, but this is phonetically improbable, as ab would develop to ap before the voiceless r of Rhys, hence Preece . Compare Breece .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Brewse was born about 1370, in Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John de Brewse, was 40 and his mother, Joan Shardelow, was 36. He married Ela Stapleton about 1405, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before 30 September 1424, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Brewse est né environ 1370, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Brewse, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Shardelow, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ela Stapleton environ 1405, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 30 septembre 1424, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Brewse um 1370 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Brewse 40 und seine Mutter Joan Shardelow 36. Er hat um 1405 in England Ela Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 30. September 1424 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Brewse è nato il circa 1370 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Brewse, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Shardelow, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Ela Stapleton circa 1405, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 30 settembre 1424, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, e fu sepolto a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Brewseが約1370年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir John de Brewseは40歳，母Joan Shardelowは36歳であった。約1405年にイギリスでEla Stapletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1424年9月30日以前にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Brewse(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Brewse(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Shardelow(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1405년 영국에서 Ela Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 9월 30일 이전 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1370–before 30 September 1424: ойролцоогоор 1370 он–1424 оны Есдүгээр сарын 30–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Brewse nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Brewse, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Shardelow, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela Stapleton aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 30 de setembro de 1424, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Brewse родился около 1370 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Brewse было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Shardelow, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela Stapleton около 1405 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 30 сентябрь 1424 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

sm.about 1370–before 30 September 1424: e tusa o le 1370–a'e le'I oo le 30 Setema 1424

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Brewse nació aproximadamente 1370, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Brewse, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Shardelow, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Ela Stapleton aproximadamente 1405, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 30 de septiembre de 1424, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
